message.content:
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  LifeLineBorderColor #888888
  LifeLineBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  ParticipantBorderColor #888888
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #E6E6F2
  ArrowColor #000000
}

participant browser
participant listener
participant sequence_1
participant http_inbound_travelocity
participant OIDC_IdP
participant http_inbound_commonauth
participant sequence_2

browser -> listener : SAML login request
listener -> sequence_1 : SAML login request
browser -> http_inbound_travelocity : SAML login request
http_inbound_travelocity -> sequence_1 : request

note over sequence_1
  <#FFFFE0>== SAML request process ==
end note
note over sequence_1
  <#FFFFE0>== OIDC request build ==
end note

sequence_1 -> http_inbound_travelocity : Redirect to IDP
OIDC_IdP -> browser : Redirect to IDP
OIDC_IdP -> browser : login page
browser -> OIDC_IdP : Submit credentials

OIDC_IdP -> http_inbound_commonauth : ID token
http_inbound_commonauth -> sequence_2 : ID token

note over sequence_2
  <#FFFFE0>== OIDC response process ==
end note
note over sequence_2
  <#FFFFE0>== SAML response build ==
end note

sequence_2 -> http_inbound_commonauth : SAML response
http_inbound_commonauth -> browser : SAML response

@enduml
